title: ctenodon priscoanus
intro: Ctenodon priscoanus, also known as Fossil Cotton or Fossil Flower, is an ancient plant that dates back to the Cretaceous period. The plant has been discovered in the form of fossilized remains and is believed to have possessed medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. Its health benefits are thought to include aiding in the treatment of wounds, reducing fever, and relieving pain, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Fossil Cotton is typically prepared as a herbal remedy through the infusion of its fossilized flowers in water or as a powder for topical application.
